# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-net-service-a
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: direct-net-service-a
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-net-service-a
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-net-service-a
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: ghcr.io/example/direct-net-service-a:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: direct-net-service-a
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-net-service-b
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: direct-net-service-b
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-net-service-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-net-service-b
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: ghcr.io/example/direct-net-service-b:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: grpc
              containerPort: 9090
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: direct-net-service-b
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 512Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-net-service-c
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: direct-net-service-c
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-net-service-c
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-net-service-c
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: ghcr.io/example/direct-net-service-c:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8000
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: direct-net-service-c
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 750m
              memory: 384Mi
